1808960.name: Firearms Factory
1808960.description:
Your factory, once producing sweets for children, has been transformed by government order into a weapons facility at the height of total war. Now, you carry a crucial responsibility. With the uranium mines under Nazi control following the occupation of Czechoslovakia, an unprecedented power awaits to be unleashed — and your humble workshop may become the birthplace of the atomic bomb.

From uranium extraction to securing heavy water for the bomb’s development, from ammunition production to building the prototype itself — every step depends on your decisions. But your duty isn’t limited to breathing life into nuclear energy. You must also balance the health and morale of your workforce, invest in upgrading workstations and production tools, and keep a close eye on technology.

Remember: war isn’t won on the battlefield alone!

Produce, Deliver, and Change the Course of War!

The fate of soldiers on the front, and perhaps the entire war, depends on the weapons and ammunition produced in your workshop — and the choices you make. You’re also responsible for delivering your products to the front lines. Influence the global war effort through your logistics network.
Gain the government's trust by supplying weapons and ammunition to various fronts in a timely and complete manner.

Remember, the state is counting on you — and the bomb must be ready before Berlin falls.

Key Features

Historical Depth: A unique narrative grounded in the nuclear infrastructure of the era — from uranium mines to heavy water facilities in Norway.

Management & Strategy: Gather and manage raw materials, build a flawless production line, plan shipments based on battlefield needs, upgrade your workshop equipment, and keep an eye on your workers' wellbeing.

Moral Dilemmas: Will you push for higher production at the cost of inhumane conditions? Or take a slower, more ethical approach? The government expects results either way!

Race Against Time: The atomic bomb must be ready before Berlin falls… or else.

Multiple Game Modes: Experience a story-driven campaign or enjoy unrestricted production in sandbox mode.

The war that changed history wasn’t won on the battlefield — it was won on the production line. Are you ready to press the button that starts the atomic age?
1808960.supported_languages: 英语, 德语, 俄语, 土耳其语, 法语, 简体中文, 繁体中文, 日语, 韩语
